svg.title: Train Design Tree v2
svg.desc: Five core concepts: Layers, Roles, The Plan, The Athlete, The Feedback Loop
svg.text: 5 core concepts · Layers × Roles → Plan → Athlete ↔ Feedback Loop
obj: max progress toward goal while healthy + consistent
Each produces own plan in their domain
obj: hit body comp targets while fueling training
Reduces friction between plan and execution
obj: zero dropped balls, zero logistics friction
Meals: what to eat × how to get it
+ grocery list, prep tasks, orders, exceptions
The promise: follow this plan and
— how reality flows back into planning
Cycle repeats daily — plan stays alive
Workout log, meal confirmation, pain report
• Exercise swaps off the swap list
Feedback updates Athlete Profile → Roles replan → new Plan → cycle continues
